node.title: Any Questions?
node.summary: A short clip made in Adobe After Effects 2020 CC

node.title: YUNA - CRUSH MV
node.summary:
This is just a short animated video for Crush by Yuna. We love her music and had to make this! It was, however, a labor of love. Over the course of 2 years this has gone through 2 corrupted files, switching to a new program, and a broken harddrive. But it's finally done!

Also, we don't have rights to the song, they belong to Yuna.

node.title: Laputa
node.summary:
This video was fun to make! 

It pushed my team's and my creativity because there was so much we could have done, but it needed to look good in the 2 days we had to make it!

node.title: JANELLE MONAE - COLD WAR
node.summary:
Made with After Effects and Illustrator. I wanted to make a video for this song for months. I got a concept I liked a few weeks ago and here it is! 

I hope you all enjoy it

node.title: Dream
node.summary: This is my final for Experimental Animation It was an amazing class and I'm really proud of most of the work from it I did this with paper cut out and the music is Yuna's Here Comes the Sun
